entry.title: Re: Enchance SAP BI platform CMS system database.unx
entry.content: I was using the QB as below select si_scheduleinfo.si_destinations, si_name, si_id from ci_infoobjects where si_kind in ('crystalreport','pdf','excel','webi') and si_scheduleinfo.si_destinations like '%crystalenterprise.smtp%' and si_instance=1

entry.title: Re: Upload Excel using SAP RAP Only
entry.content: I guess that the point was about saying "Excel file", it's always non-sense for knowledgeable people as there are many different formats that Excel can open, but many applications can work only with few. I guess there would be no comment if your title was "Upload CSV file using SAP RAP Only". But maybe then, many people wouldn't understand CSV... 😄

entry.title: Tax jurisdiction and VAT TAX code query
entry.content:
Hi  SAP Expert,

Could you please help me in the below for setting up customer master data urgently please?

1. How can I make  tax jurisdiction field required in customer master data for only one sales organization?

2. How can i set rules in place in customer master data that only customers who provide a relevant VAT number can be set as tax exempt customer?

Kind Regards

S Sinha

entry.title: Hide LineItem in view but still use it for semantic object navigation
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have declared this lineItems: 

@odata.draft.enabled
annotate service.REBuildings with @(UI.LineItem: [
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Value: buildingCode,
        Label: '{i18n>Code}',
    },
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Value: description,
        Label: '{i18n>Description}',
    },
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Value: ToSite_siteCode,
        Label: '{i18n>Site}',
    },
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Value: buildingStatus_code,
    },
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Label: '{i18n>Buildingcode}',
        Value: buildingType_code,
    },
    {
        $Type: 'UI.DataField',
        Value: ToSite_ID,
        Label: 'siteID',
    },
]);
 
I want to hide the last one (ToSite_ID) in the view but I still need to declare it in order to perform semantic object navigation to sites entity, I tried to use ![@UI.Hidden]: true but this hides the value in the UI and eliminates it from the oData call. 
 
Does someone know how to achieve this functionality?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Shaik

entry.title: Re: How to read all the instances of a text field value in a repeated subform in Adobe forms
entry.content: Hi abhishek, Thanks in advance!!. Could explain how you achieve it?

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @Wanda_Soetomo,

Thanks for a great post. As you mentioned many users have implemented many HANA Calculation Views on top of SAP BW/4HANA and may asking, how they can use these HANA Calculation Views on SAP Datasphere. That's a very reasonable question. It's a valid use case for BW & BW/4HANA users who want to use SAP Datasphere.

You've shown us how to create an SAP HANA Database project in the Business Application Studio and how to use Datasphere HDI containers and views in the project. It's good to see all the pieces coming together here and there. As a final step, you've created a HANA Calculation view in the project. Now what? Can we do more with this HANA view? Since the core question is how they can use these HANA Calculation Views on SAP Datasphere. Can't Can't we just use HANA Calculation View to access data from SAP Datasphere (BW Bridge space or Datasphere native space via Datasphere View) and create graphical views / SQL views in Datasphere? If we have done it, we have simply shown how to do it! Don't we need to abandon HANA Calculation Views in Datasphere world? Users who create HANA Calculation Views in their old world should forget about continuing HANA Calculation Views, instead they need to dive into Datasphere world and use modeling options. Am I seeing right? 🙂

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Purpose of INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY
entry.content: Also check recent note 3428695.The config setting "INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY" only works on those dimension members that are included under the "not in hierarchy" node in the dimension.

entry.title: Re: Enchance SAP BI platform CMS system database.unx
entry.content: I haven't figured that out yet. There is a path to get to that specific information, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_DESTINATIONS.<A bunch of other stuff>.SI_MAIL_ADDRESS.

entry.title: Re: Purpose of INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY
entry.content: You still face the issue if you chose not to display orphan members in dimension configuration, see recent note 3428695. The config setting "INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY" only works on those dimension members that are included under the "not in hierarchy" node in the dimension. 😞

entry.title: Re: Mass changes to the accounting document
entry.content:
See also Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous) https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/c3833c31e7724a79b23e4273290f3e2e.html?locale=en-US

see also blog APIs for Journal Entries – The Collection https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/apis-for-journal-entries-the-collection/ba-p/13565258

Guidelines for API Journal Entry – Change (Asynchronous) https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/guidelines-for-api-journal-entry-change-asynchronous/ba-p/13409513

Alternatively you can edit line items one by one in app Manage Supplier Line Items.

Any changes should be thoroughly tested on your test system prior to implementation on production system. You hold full responsibility for all customizing, changes and postings you make on your system.

Choose the option that best meets your needs.

entry.title: Data and Analytics Group - Member #100
entry.content:
I had published Why Don't We Use Data and Analytics Group on SAP Community? and since then ~15 plus members have joined Data and Analytics

There are now 83 members. @Dian and @valentinrabitz joined yesterday. Let's see who will be member #100 and how long it will take to reach this goal. No, we don't have a special gift for member #100! 😀

I envy the Application Development group with its 1,528 members and 390,427 posts! 🙂

I will update this post when member #100 has joined.

Cheers,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi nickzhou,

we had this link but it seems to be broken under events here: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/document-reporting-compliance

We are working on getting it back working, please keep checking.

Martin

entry.title: CAP Nodes Local development Test Business User
entry.content:
Hello,

I built a CAP CDS project that serves some entities. In addition, this project also consumes external remote services. This is not a new project but an old project prior to "cds bind" days. The application works perfectly fine in cloud BTP. It was working fine locally in VS Code but it is broke with new mechanism.

In past, I had the users in cdsrc.json file under auth. the package cds auth refers to XSUAA.

"auth": {"passport": {"strategy": "mock","users": {.
The default-env.json has VCAP_SERvices to both destination and xsuaa service credentials copied from btp corresponding services. This worked fine. I was able to call the service locally using basic userid/password from cdsrc.json. The connection to consumed services routed using destination in btp with xsuaa.
 
Now the challenge. Removed vcap services and added the two services (auth and dest) with cds bind. the bound works fine. The users in cdsrc.json broke. the cds project does not honor those users any more. Any recommendation or sample please ?
 
Updated.... 
Create a simple CDS project without XSUAA. Added "authenticated-user" to the test service. and added users in cdsrc.json and tested from browser. In browser, get a prompt for basic user/password. and login works. User ID/Password from cdsrc.json.
Now added xsuaa to the project. and deployed to BTP. bound the project to the auth service. the user from cdsrc.json does not work anymore.
 
Thank you
Durga

entry.title: Fiori Elements Internal Navigation
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

In a Fiori Elements application I'm trying to navigate to an ObjectPage by clicking on the button and I am getting this error in the console.

Could anyone tell me what I'm doing wrong?

 

Best regards,
Brenda Alves.

entry.title: Offsetting PO line items
entry.content: I have not found what I consider an acceptable way to transfer inventory and cost it at the same time.  The solution I would have liked to have would be to have positive and negative PO Lines and then the ability to do a landed cost as well.  Then when I transfer 20 pallets of XYZ I can put PO line to the 3PL vendor for the new cost of the items that we will incur from them when they receive the stock.  (eg. receiving fees, put away and initial storage) placing the inventory now in that designated warehouse for fulfillment of related customer orders.  Then I add a negative 20 pallets of XYZ for the current cost of the items and not their location etc. (we use produmex).  Then if I use a seperate freight company to transfer the inventory it can use the landed costing to top off my unit cost at the 3PL location.  I have fiddled in test data but it will not allow me to have a negative PO qty.  I have used another ERP solution in the past that did allow me to both have postive and negative units on PO and then they netted to the ultimate vendor invoice I was going to pay for 3PL fees.  And then of course pay freight company if different using the Landed costs.  Seems like the cleanest way to do this surely it can be done somehow?

entry.title: Re: BTP destination configuration to send email using Office 365
entry.content:
There's a SAP Note available now:

3451530 - Get error "Sending an email is not possible due to authentication issues" when testing SMTP server in BPA

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003451530

To me it looks like Microsoft applied a few changes and SAP did not update the documentation yet (Configure an SMTP Mail Destination | SAP Help Portal).

Basic Authentication didn't work for me with Microsoft.

I do suggest to use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ses/ ) with Basic Authentication.

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hi Archie,

what you did is correct. After material inspection status of the repair object should be changed.
Please check in your inspection, if follow-up activity 0027 - Continue In-House Repair (Service), if you started the returns process from in-house repair.

Regards,
Udo

entry.title: Re: Hide LineItem in view but still use it for semantic o...
entry.content: don't add the field to the lineitem, but you can still have the field in your odata by using requestatleast

entry.title: Re: Change Recipient in the Purchasing Flexible Workflow
entry.content: Hi, I think you should append multiple users to changing parameter of the BADI APPROVERLIST (it is a table parameter). Then select "all of the recipients" if to go to next level you wait all the recipients to approve or "one of the recipients" if just one is sufficient, according to your business need.

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @su01:

I don't think you could subscribe to search results in the previous platform, and there are no plans to add this functionality to this platform.

If you don't want to use RSS feeds for specific searches, you could bookmark a search. That's a bit more manual -- and I'm afraid there's no subscription/notification involved -- but it might be a useful alternative for checking on new content via your favorite search criteria.

Our how-to videos walk through a variety of search scenarios: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/how-to-videos.

I know that's not perfect, but I hope it provides some help.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: How to create a Sales Order in the new fiori application with configurable materials ?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on a the SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition and not able to access the modification feature of characteristic values for configurable materials which is the following screen, when creating and/or editing a sales order in the new fiori application: 

In the "change Sales Order", when adding a new item to my Sales Order with a configurable material => I was expecting to have the popup above to be able to modify the configuration variant data! 

But no popup is displayed.

Then If I go to the "display sales order" => I can see a "configuration column" for configurable materials:

This "configuration column" is displayed in the "display SO" new fiori app, but IS NOT not shown when switching to the Edit mode) => is that normal? something is missing or this is a bug to raise to SAP?

On the other hand, if I use the "change Sales Order - VA02" application from whitin the fiori launchpad, I can see the "old" configuration button which allows me to access the variant configuration modification feature: 

Is this feature "hidden"? "not available" yet?

Thanks all

entry.title: Question about RHEl support with SAP Data Services 4.3
entry.content:
In the SAP Data Services 4.3 PAM it says RHEL 9.2 is first supported on SAP Data Services 4.3 SP03, however can we upgrade our current Data Services 4.2 system running on RHEL 8.8 to 4.3 SP03 without upgrading operating system to RHEL 9.2? We would like to stay on RHEL 8.8 for the time being.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Data Wrangling function : titleCase(string)
entry.content: When I try to execute function "titleCase(string)" , it fails to execute.

entry.title: Re: Error loading webview loading Sap Business Application Studio
entry.content: you are a genious, thanks

entry.title: Re: Question about RHEl support with SAP Data Services 4.3
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

I think there is a misunderstanding in reading the SAP Data Services 4.3 Product Availability Matrix (PAM). 

On page 8, it says RHEL 9.2 is supported from SAP Data Services 4.3 SP03.This means that if you want to be on Operating system RHEL 9.2 then you should be on atleast DS 4.3 SP03.

Your case is the opposite from above statement.

You want to be on DS 4.3 SP03 with RHEL 8.8 version. 

According to PAM, the RHEL 8.8 version is supported with Data Services 4.3 SP2 Patch 4 and above. That means all the data services versions above 4.3 SP2 Patch 4 supported RHEL 8.8 version.

So, your requirement, RHEL 8.8 and DS 4.3 SP03 are compatible.

Thankyou

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to convert csv files to data-binary format in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hello Mlissa,

What is the correct link? It is corrupt, we are interested in the solution to convert the CSV to BIN and then attach it in a REST

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database Encryption
entry.content: @rodrigo_monroy you may see very minimal impact in terms of CPU when an encrypted backup triggers. We have seen 5% higher CPU consumption than what regular backups. This is not overall CPU consumption but just considering the CPU consumed by backups only.

entry.title: Error while updating Infotype 2001 using custom function in PT60.
entry.content:
I've created the custom function and incorporated "HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION" for creating record in Infotype 2001, that custom function is placed in Time Schema after below line

QUOTA Generate absence quota

When Time Evaluation (PT60) is executed it is creating the records in IT2001 but it is not creating data for all periods, lets say I ran PT60 from 06/01/2023 to 12/31/2023, it is only generating 12.2023 period it is skipping from 06.2023 to 11.2023. I commented logic in my custom function and re-ran, it is generating data for all periods from 06.2023 to 12.2023. It looks like side-effect of my code but couldn't understand why it is skipping periods 06.2023 to 11.2023. Any suggestions are much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Multiple entries in a Single table via OData service
entry.content:
You can't create multiple entries with OData's CRUD operations. For bulk creation, use batch processing.

Edit: You can also make use of OData's deep create feature. You'll have to modify your OData to add a new parent entity type (For example, a VBAK entity type) which will hold multiple VBAP entities using navigation property (VBAK 1:N VBAP cardinality). Sending a deep create request on VBAK will let you pass multiple VBAP entries in same request, the multiple entries then can be created in backend all at once.

entry.title: What is the workaround for the Quote Action Update Sales Quote in Quote 2.0?
entry.content:
I want to update the sales quote after the change of the status, can I know What will be the workaround for the Quote Action Update Sales Quote in Quote 2.0 as the Quote action is Obsoleted?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the workaround for the Quote Action Update Sa...
entry.content: The matter you've described seems to be related to implementation rather than a potential error or defect in the standard delivered product. We regret to inform you that implementation topics are not covered under the scope of SAP Active Global Support as per the SAP maintenance agreement.

entry.title: 1H 2024 Release Highlights: New Innovations in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding
entry.content:
With the 1H 2024 release, we have introduced new capabilities within SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding to enhance new hire and hiring manager efficiency, accelerate processes, and improve experiences across the hiring process.   

Through customer influence on the Customer Community and innovative product enhancements, we are bringing your ideas to life and driving improvements across the onboarding experience.  

To learn more watch the Q&A webinar: 1H 2024 Release – Recruiting & Onboarding Webinar.  

All of the 1H 2024 release items can be found on the What’s New Viewer. These new features will be live in Production on May 17th, 2024.  

Enhanced New Hire Experience  

 

With this release, new hires can now leverage a simplified new user interface to easily view and complete all outstanding tasks on one page. The enhanced new hire experience provides new hires with an improved onboarding process, offering a comprehensive view of the entire onboarding journey. By guiding new hires through an intuitive, step-by-step process, you can simplify task completion while allowing new hires to track their progress, manage outstanding tasks, and complete them with ease.  

Mass Handling of Tasks  

To help streamline the hiring process, hiring managers can now complete mass outstanding tasks for multiple new hires, reducing bottlenecks and improving process efficiency. Hiring managers can select up to 100 new hires to complete standard new hire activities for, such as completing the welcome message, assigning a buddy, or recommending people.   

Automated Hiring  

For SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central customers, automatic processing of new hires from SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding helps expedite hiring by skipping tedious data validation steps, when necessary. This capability is specifically valuable in cases of mass, seasonal, deskless, or high-volume hiring to boost efficiency and reduce the time it takes to bring on new employees. 

With every release, we are excited to deliver these new innovations and continue our journey of providing even greater value to our SAP SuccessFactors customers. For full details, please check out the 1H 2024 Release Highlights Resources:  

  • 1H 2024 Release Highlights Brochure  
  • 1H 2024 Release Highlights Video  
  • Product Release & Road Map Information  

Learn more about SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding.

entry.title: Adobe Forms - Terms & Conditions Printing
entry.content:
This is an order confirmation form in which client has shared PDF file to be printed at last as terms and conditions(T&C). This PDF is of 10 pages which includes some tables, logo too.

Challenge which we are facing here is saving these files at one place and from there printing in adobe form layout. Currently we are stuck with main part i.e., uploading to some location(E.g. AL11) and fetching and printing on form.

Can someone please suggest if anybody has achieved similar requirement or any suggestions on possible ways to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: thank you still doesn't work

entry.title: Re: Entity in schema not found error when creating dataso...
entry.content:
Hi,

This was fixed.

As we need to load the data from 2 schemas from PCM (CMAN and DN) synonyms were created for the views under the DBS06_BW_RO schema so only one connection would be created in BW/4. It seems that based on note 3075945 - BW/4 1.00 SP20: Hana datasources doesn't support Synonyms of Tables of Remote Sources - SAP for Me - Hana datasources doesn't support Synonyms of Tables of Remote Sources. This is because the updated HANA SDA/SDI doesn't support this anymore. The official recommendation is to use Only Tables or Views of the Remote Sources. If you still want to use the Synonyms you can install the advanced correction and follow the manual activity. BW/4 doesn't recommend this officially. I did not implement this workaround as SAP does not recommend it. To fix this I deleted the connection which was pointing to SCHEMA with the synonyms – DBS06A_BW_RO and created 2 new connections for each schema(CMAN and DN).

entry.title: Missing source of supply.
entry.content:
Hi experts!

 

I'm trying run operator SOP operator, but it send me a message about error "Missing source of supply". I checked every master data about this case, but I can't found this problem.

could you help me?

entry.title: Re: An internal server error occured: The MPL ID for the...
entry.content:
Got same error before.  that's how is solved.  

  Goto SAP Integration, select Monitor.  From Dashboard select All Artifacts.   

select the error artefact.   Read log's detail, normally it will explain where is the error.

entry.title: Change of Granularity
entry.content:
Hello, 

Currently we are having Granularity set to "Optimized for metric monitoring" so all the metric information is available for 30 days only. due to the issues happening in our landscape we are planning to increase this Granularity period to LONG so that we can have history of data to analyze the issue further. But before changing the granularity from small to LONG for all the enabled metrics we would like to know the system performance issues or Database growth to consider and what would be the affect if we change to LONG for all the metrics and which tables will grow after enabling it to LONG.

Could some experts help gives some KBAs, blogs or links?

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change of Granularity
entry.content:
Using the highest possible granularity, the DB resources will be affected.

Please see the KBAs:

2616155 - ASR configuration for data extraction

2662015 - System Monitoring - metrics historical data for timeframe more than a month not displaying

Regards

Miriam

entry.title: Buildpack compile failed for python app
entry.content:
Hi Experts

While attempting to cf push a python app from the BAS terminal below error is reported. Please advise how to check logs and find out root cause of error / fix. 

Security group rules were updated
Cell cc6e118f-2e6d-4bfb-b336-3f8195746fda successfully created container for instance 6bc47847-d598-498e-975f-313c66a3bc16
BuildpackCompileFailed - App staging failed in the buildpack compile phase

Running the command cf push -v gives the below

},
"staging_disk_in_mb": 4096,
"staging_log_rate_limit_bytes_per_second": -1,
"staging_memory_in_mb": 1024,
"state": "FAILED",
"updated_at": "2024-04-30T17:19:07Z"
}


BuildpackCompileFailed - App staging failed in the buildpack compile phase
FAILED

Composite roles are a very important option in the authorization side.

Thanks for all!

KR,

Ines

entry.title: Experience the new Product Maintenance reporting in SAP for Me / Customer Insights dashboard
entry.content:
The  ‘Customer Insights‘ dashboard  is an interactive reporting developed in SAP for Me to power the success of your SAP investment with proactive and timely status updates of your SAP solutions across all products, support contracts and deployment types. It is being continuously improved and developed based on your input and your feedback.

Recently released section ‘Maintenance’ provides an overview on the product maintenance status for your on-premise and private cloud products.

You can access this section from the Entry Page (Summary) using the relevant Summary card or by clicking on the tab “Maintenance” in the tab menu. The new Maintenance reporting section provide you with a wide range of analytical capabilities to  find exact the maintenance information you are looking for. 

In the default view of the Maintenance  section you see 3 graphs for the visualization for the content and 2 interactive tables at the bottom to display the details. 

The tables are referring to each other. In the right table "Systems" all systems with their Software Product are displayed, pre-filtered for production systems only.

  • If you select a system by clicking the check box in the left table "Systems", the right table "Maintenance Details" will display you all product versions installed on this selected system. The graphs will be adjusted accordingly and only contain the information for the selected system. The rating of the system in the "System" table depends on the Leading Product’s maintenance rating.

    In the example below the selected system is rated green (which means the maintenance will expire in more than 3 years) because the SAP EHP 7 has been implemented additionally to the leading product SAP ERP 6.0.

    For SAP ERP 6,0 and some other product versions SAP provides  the mainstream maintenance until the end of 2027, see here for details. This rule has been considered in the maintenance calculation in this reporting.

  • The selection is working also other way around. You can also identify quickly which systems are affected when a product version (Leading Product / Add-On or Additional Product) has expired or going to expire. If you select a product version in the table "Maintenance Details", you will see all relevant systems listed in the table “Systems” where this product version is used. Sort the table "Maintenance Details" by the last column “Number of Systems”  to see which product version is relevant for most systems.

 Using the graphs, you can get a very quick overview on your overall maintenance situation, e.g.

  • See all product versions which have expired or going to expire by clicking on the relevant segment in the Overview graph.

  • Show only leading products which are going to expire within the next 2 years by clicking on the appropriate segment in the second graph etc.


The special filters in the right upper corner of the section help you in setting your individual focus how to check the maintenance situation.

  • Selecting only Leading Products filter you get an overview on the maintenance situation across all leading products.

 

  • In the filter for the “Product Version” you can search for the special Add-on, Leading Product or Additional Product to check their maintenance status.

 

In the default view only productive systems are pre-selected. But you can change this selection if needed using the "System Role" filter.

The link on the system number leads you to the system details in the Systems & Provisioning dashboard. With the link in the column "Product Version" you can navigate to the SAP Product Availability Matrix. 

As in all other reporting sections you can also customize the graphs and change the table(s) by adding / removing some columns, sort and group the content, and export the table.

Do not forget to save your changes as a variant, if you want to keep them for the next access.

Please use the ‘Feedback’ slider on the right edge of the page of the application to share with us your feedback on this new tool and help us to improve the reporting functionality in SAP for Me.

Stay updated by subscribing to this blog and visiting the SAP Support Portal / Customer Insights.

SAP for Me is made for you!

Related blogs:  all related blogs to ‘Customer Insights’ reporting dashboard, Maintenance Strategy / Maintenance 2040

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content:
Hi,

"I need HU warehouse tasks for the delivery. "

Why would you need that?

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: SAC: Do we need to define the properties of a dimensi...
entry.content: Thanks @N1kh1l

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: Using Variable derivation for currency conversion measures within Analytic Model
entry.content:
Hi @TuncayKaraca ,

Thanks for pointing this. I have fixed it.

Regards,

Jai

entry.title: Onboarding I-9
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Summary: This scenario is when an existing employee is due for an I-9 Reverification and has received a change of status from A NONCITIZEN AUTHORIZED TO WORK to A LAWFUL PERMANENT RESIDENT.

  • When someone is in the I-9 Reverification bucket in SF, one of the initial prompted fields asks "is the citizenship/immigration status selected correct”
  • Once the corporate representative has selected "No", a message populates with the image of a stop sign prompting the  corporate representative to have the employee enter their password and correct this field accordingly. (Please see image below)
  • As most employees do not recall the password that they created when they were initially hired, we are forced to open a ticket with our technology team to reset it. This creates a delay in the process for completing the employee's reverification and puts us at risk of not completing it by the required due date.

So, the business wanted to know why is the employee(employee password) included in this process as this is entirely completed by the HR.

 

 

Thanks,

Long

entry.title: Hello!
entry.content: Hi! I'm Francesca and I'm excited to begin my SAP blogging journey.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere + SAP S/4HANA: Your Guide to Seamless Data Integration
entry.content:
@MKreitlein: Thank you and Great to know that my article is helping you.

In general, It is always recommended to use the latest available version of SAP S/4HANA and the DMIS add-on where possible.

This is not directly related however this talk about updating S4 and best practices which will be applicable for the connectivity components as well: https://www.sap.com/documents/2020/06/94ca0995-9d7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Level Agreement Credit Claim made easy in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hi  JeniferFrey

Thanks for the heads-up. I changed to 30 days.

Best regards,

Nathalie

entry.title: Sign in with an Email link - New upcoming feature for SAP Concur in Q2 2024
entry.content:
What is the ' Sign in with an Email link/ Passwordless Sign-In ' feature?

Overview

This feature allows a user to enter their username or verified email address in https://www.concursolutions.com/  and then at the next step,  see an option that says ' Sign in with an email link'. The user then receives an email with a one-time link to sign in to Concur.  We can also call the ' Sign in without a password' feature as 'Passwordless Sign In'.

Key Benefits

 

  1. Improved User Experience: Passwordless login streamlines the authentication process, leading to a smoother and more efficient user experience. Users no longer need to type in passwords or go through the hassle of resetting forgotten passwords.
  2. Elimination of Password Management Hassles: Users don't need to remember complex passwords or worry about password resets.
  3. Does not compromise on security: Since the one-time link has an expiry time of 1 hour and is sent only to the user's email address, it does not compromise on security unless the user's email has been hacked
  4. Reduces need to create Support cases when the account gets locked: If you are unsure of your password, use the passwordless sign-in option instead of attempting multiple password entries and locking your account
  5. Alternative to 2FA: If you are stuck during the 2FA registration or login flow ( getting an incorrect 6 digit code error), login quickly using the passwordless login feature to sign into Concur

Overall, passwordless login features, particularly those leveraging one-time email links, offer secure, user-friendly, and efficient authentication solutions for both businesses and users alike.

How it works

Once the feature is released in Q2 2024 (The exact date will be updated)

  1. Go to https://www.concursolutions.com/
  2. Enter the username or verified email address

    3.  You will see an option to ' Sign in with an email link'

    4.  If you click Sign in with an Email Link, a sign-in link is sent to the Email 1 and/or
    Email 2 email address ( Note: These email addresses need NOT be verified. ) configured in the Email Addresses section of the My Profile
    – Personal Information page in SAP Concur Solutions. If neither Email1 nor Email2 exists, and the username is of email address format, we'll try to send the email to that address. 

    Configuration Settings - For Admins

     

    • Works for both Standard and Professional edition 
    • The feature will be automatically turned on for companies that have SSO optional setting.
      • To check if you have SSO optional setting, the Company's SSO Admin should navigate to Authentication Admin → Manage SSO → Check the SSO Setting

        For SSO optional companies, any user who enters their username and navigates to the next page will see an option called ' Sign in with an Email link'

      • If you want to disable the 'Passwordless Login' feature for all users in your company

        • Go to Authentication Admin
        • Navigate to Sign In Settings
        • Navigate to Others- Miscellaneous Policies
        • Disable the checkbox for the policy "Allow users to sign in using an email link"
        • We cannot disable this feature per user/group of users

     Pre- Requisites

  • SSO Required companies will have the feature disabled by default, but they can enable it manually if they choose
  • .Feature is automatically enabled for SSO Optional companies.
  • This feature is NOT available on Mobile device login or Concur Mobile App sign-in. Works only for web browser sign-in.
  • User should have a working email address configured in Email 1/ Email 2 under Profile settings. Users who do not have access to the Email Addresses section of the My Profile –
    Personal Information page—for example, invoice-only users—must have a valid email address associated with their user account. The email address associated with their account can be confirmed by their company’s Concur user administrator.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: PowerBI Direct Query via HANA Cloud Calculation Views

entry.title: providing IAS authentication through cloud identity service for UI5 MTA app
entry.content:
Hi,
I have created a sap ui5  MTA(multi target application) with stand alone app router. its having mta-approuter(router), mta-ui(ui5 app), xs-security.json, mta.yml etc..
mta-approuter is having xs-app.json file which is pointing to mta-ui as the welcome file and authentication as 'route'. mta-ui as well having another xs-app.json file which is having the default route pointing to html5-repo-rt and 'xsuaa' as authentication type.
I have deployed this app to CF and on running the app from CF its working good.

Now I wanted to try out cloud identity services which provides IAS authentication. So i have created an IDP in my trial account. then inside my mta-ui's 'xs-app.json' i have changed authentication type from 'xsuaa' to 'ias' .

And in my mta.yml i have added a identity service in the required section of app router and  defined it in resource section as well.

Now I have deployed it to CF. On try running the app I am getting the below error. even i tried enabling third party cookies. 

my expectation is same like default IDP with cloud identity services as well SSO works smoothly.

Can you please help me what am i missing?

PFA details of app/trial account.

 

Thank in Advance.

entry.title: SAP CDC WebSDK configuration not loading
entry.content:
Hi there,

I have created a parent site with a single child and put some JS logic in the parent's WebSDK configuration.

Then I created a simple web page and correctly referenced the Gigya library (based on the child ApiKey).

When the page loads, the logic inside the WebSDK configuration does not fire. I have tried simply adding a console.log() but nothing,

Could you please help me?

Thanks,

Valerio

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and ServiceNow Integration - has it worked for anyone?
entry.content:
Hi All,

After trying my hands on the integration for over 2 months now and failing, I am finally reaching out to this community to see if the integration ever worked for any of you?

Has anyone made it work with oauth authentication and APIgee involved (because direct integration isn't allowed in your org).

Even though SAP provides standard mapping, do we need to follow that format? Can we create our own mapping from scratch for ServiceNow integration? 

If any of you has created mapping from scratch and it has worked, could you please share?

Any help or information with your experience, whether you were able to successfully integrate it or not, please share here. I would love to know how it worked or not worked for you?

Thank you.

entry.title: Setting the backend OData Service Alias in a BTP Destination. Possible?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a scenario as follows with BTP UI5 apps making OData calls to backend ECC systems:

BTP Cloud Foundry UI5 App > BTP Destination > SAP Cloud Connector > Gateway Hub > ECC (NW 7.00)

For a very specific reason we would like to set the Alias assigned to the OData service on the Gateway Hub via the BTP Destination, rather than inside the UI5 app itself, or via other external means. I'm talking about the ";o=<ALIAS>" part of the OData URL.

I am hoping that SAP have some internal option within the SAP BTP Destination service (specifically on Cloud Foundry) which can inject the ";o=<ALIAS>" into the correct place in the OData URL if we specify it in a special Destination Property.

I have searched high and low and tried various properties like "sap-system-alias" or "sap-system" but they don't work, or were designed to work somewhere else. I have also tried these names and some others as HTTP Headers as a guess, but no luck.

Anyone have any idea if an 'Alias' Property exists in Cloud Foundry Destinations which can do what I need?

Note also that we are very experienced with all of this and know every other possible way to handle Aliases on OData calls in relation to BTP, ECC or S/4. But we have one very specific requirement where using a BTP Destination would save us a lot of hassle.

Thanks in advance,

Brendan

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 New Hire directed to SSO screen
entry.content:
We have recently implemented onboarding 2.0 and currently do not have IAS and noticed that some of the new hires are directed to SSO screen when they try to login. The issue is mainly with the new hires who save the info and then come back later to login and are not able to log back in again and finish the assigned New Hire tasks. Wanted to check if someone else is also facing this issue and if they have a resolution for this? It is providing a very poor New Hire experience when they are updating and providing additional information and causes delays in their onboarding process.

Looking forward to some useful suggestions !

entry.title: Consolidation Transaction Type Wrongly Determined
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Can someone please help me. I am trying to understand how our SAP S/4 hana system was able to determine different consolidation TTypes for an asset retirement posting.

My client has posted an asset retirement with an asset Ttype T20 (BSEG_ANBWA). Based on the customizing of T20, the system derived the consolidation Ttype 010 (BSEG_BEWAR). the relationship here is quite understood through the table TABW.

However, the Ttype 010 was only derived for the header item. the line item has different consolidation transaction type eg. 170 which does not match the desire of the client. here the client is expecting to get a ttype eg. 110. I cannot determine how this other consolidation transaction types for the line items were determined since they are not maintained in the TABW table. Therefore, I am unable to change it

We have not maintained any view on V_T856K nor have we maintained any substitution rule.

Can someone please advise me on how to customize the system to derive the correct Consolidation ttype?

entry.title: headers are not assigned to any storage location.
entry.content: Hi experts, headers are not assigned to any storage location. Please assist.

entry.title: Error: javax.xml.transform.TransformerException: Source object passed to ''{0}'' has no contents.
entry.content:
Hi, I'm working on an iflow that's called via HTTP, receives a json payload, processes it, and returns a different json payload. All works well as far as I can see on the trace, but at the very last step when the iflow ends, it errors out with the error:

javax.servlet.ServletException: Error during write of the response: , cause: javax.xml.transform.TransformerException: Source object passed to ''{0}'' has no contents.

On the client side, the call to the iflow ends with HTTP Status 500 – Internal Server Error

You can see the model above. All the steps are proper, the payload is correct on every step, and at the end of the XML to JSON conversion, the message body contains the proper payload. Then it fails.

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Issue on printing label. Label output template´s logi...
entry.content:
Hello

we do not have any clue regarding the generation variant you are using (and the set up of this) nor the logic in WWI Template nor the data you try to read (may be they exist? may be they do not exist).

Check e,g,

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/wwi-for-beginners/ba-p/13236080

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/wwi-for-experts/ba-p/13237791

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/wwi-topics-to-list/ba-p/13356006

and many other blogs

But not Blog or "question/answer" story here can help you for your specific situation

I am sorry.

C.B.

entry.title: Username visibility on General Display Name

entry.title: Re: How to upload a key pair generated from puTTy in CPI...
entry.content:
If you find error in upload the private key  in CPI tenant. Check this :

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/create-keystore-ssh-key-for-sap-commissions-data-loader-cdl-in-sap-cloud/ba-p/13558541

Note if you generate SSH from OpenSSH. then the private key is in .pem format. You have to use PuTTYgen to convert the key from .pem to .ppk format.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere + SAP S/4HANA: Your Guide to Seamless Data Integration
entry.content:
@TuncayKaraca  - Thank you and great questions. 

At this point, this goes into detail about the supported features for remote tables or replication flow, etc. e.g.: ODP sources with ABAP CDS view @Analytics.dataextraction.enabled: true for 1:1 remote view(entity) access or replication. Model Import option which provides an option to semantic information like it will scan the CDS view and propose the core and associated entities.

Unavailable CDS Views: The required CDS views haven't been released yet. Missing Data Extraction Settings: The data extraction settings are not configured even if the CDS views are available. There are two approaches to resolving these issues:

Open a Ticket: A ticket can be submitted to the relevant component for a long-term solution. Be aware that this process may take some time.
Build a Custom CDS View: You can create a custom CDS view that replicates the missing one. You can then enable data extraction on this custom view for your use.

entry.title: Incentive Management OData APIs (Kubernetes) Questions
entry.content:
I have an application I'm working on that connects to the SAP Incentive Management OData APIs (Kubernetes) API.  I'm bringing back the first 100 rows of the Incentive Management Pipelines.

In Postman, the first 2 PipelineRunSeq values are 20547673299878036 and 20547673299878035.

In my application, I have a TypeScript file that is supposed to retrieve the same 100 Pipelines.  The first 2 PipelineRunSeq values are 20547673299878036 and 20547673299878036.  The other values of the first item returned match the values of 20547673299878036 in Postman.  The other values of the second item match the values of 20547673299878035 in Postman.

The next 5 rows from the response in the application have 20547673299878030 as the PipelineRunSeq but the other values match the values in Postman for 20547673299878034, 20547673299878033, 20547673299878032, 20547673299878031 & 20547673299878030.

I'm stumped as to why the PipelineRunSeq is being returned in this way from within the TS script.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

The main question we have is if real on-premise SAP EIC is supported by SAP when running on Linux Servers or IBM Power systems?  or is it only supported over Windows systems? 

Any input or guidance on this topic will be very appreciated.

Thanks!

Kind regards!

entry.title: Documentation Output Issue in Enable Now
entry.content:
I updated one of the Documentation Styles: SAP - Single Document and finished editing/saved it to server. Once I did that, I could see that under Start Links for this entity, the Local Preview showed the new version of doc output when I clicked the 'Play Content' button. But the Authoring Preview and Published View are still showing the old version.

I tried everything from synchronizing workarea to publishing the Adaptable Resources but nothing helped. I even went to the Manager and verified that my updated version was in fact the most recent published version.

My team is not able to see my changes that I made to the SAP - Single Document when they Generate Word Document outputs that use the SAP - Single Document as the template.

Please advise.

entry.title: Dunning Payment Deadline Date Printed Wrong on the Dunning Notice
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I am having an issue that the payment deadline date on my dunning form is the same as the dunning date. However, in the dunning procedure, I have defined the payment deadline date to be 7 days from the dunning date.

We are using a custom solution; therefore, we have derived the value in the structure F150D_ZIELD. 

Can someone please tell me what maybe wrong here or where I could get the correct value for the payment deadline date.

Cheers

entry.title: Re: Print custom page range from Crystal Report Viewer
entry.content:
You are welcome...

The P2P API is a legacy mode designed when CR for VS was installed with Visual Studio back in VS6 days.

It's normal behaviour in what is called CR Basic, same as the Embedded report designer, has limited functionality, it uses the printer saved in the Report. You can test this by opening the report in CRD and hit the Print button, select the Printer and save the report. Next time your app should default to that selected printer.

Also the Viewers default printer API is P2P, using the routines in my test app uses the PrintOutputController (POC) and allows your users to select the printer of choice.

entry.title: Re: c# crystal reports 2015 one report - 10 pages
entry.content:
You are using a very old SP 18.

Time to upgrade to the latest SP 35:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See this blog I wrote to upgrade to the latest:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

To print only one page you may need to set the filter to only return 1 page of data or other options.

Try my Printing test app and see if that helps:

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

If not then need more details?

Anna

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?

Where I am from is easy. Where to go is my problem.
I was born and raised three decades in Ecuador, then moved to Dayton Ohio & Manhattan New York 5 years each, and now in Fort Lauderdale Florida for the last 25 years.
A few days ago I saw how to provide feedback in the help portal (documentation) and I recently found the feedback link at the top of the tutorials. It is an interesting trip full of choices. This is a short stop following the Tour of the SAP Community 2024. What next? Who knows! more exploration for sure.

entry.title: Connecting Multiple Primaries to each other

Our objective is to find a way to create a connection / parent relationship or some way to identify mergers and acquisitions as the same company even if they have unique brokerID's and different names.    can you please let us know if there is a way to solve for that? 

I figure we could potential relate Agency B,C,and D to A through some sort of connection.   We are open to suggestions though.

entry.title: SAP Data Services Error Codes. What Do These Mean ?
entry.content:
We have a fairly simple SAPDS job that sends out TXT files via FTP. It fails sometimes with error codes, but I don't understand the cause, and what the codes mean. How can I get more useful info ?

For example:

Function call <exec ( cmd, D:\OutBound\BatchFiles\BatchFile02.bat, 0 ) > failed, due to error <50306>: <Function <exec>
failed to execute program <cmd D:\OutBound\BatchFiles\BatchFile02.bat>. Program terminated with exit code <13>.>.

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management

Hello, 

Could you please provide more details about the 30 days we will have to revert to legacy?

Could you provide steps on how to revert in Upgrade center? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Utilizing SAP BTP Integration Suite for Integration with SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 provides multiple options for exporting or importing data to/from non-SAP systems. These include utilizing CSV files for data import/export, Autoflow for triggering events upon data modifications within the V2 system, and REST APIs. For further information on these options, please consult the help guide below:

Data Import and Export

AutoFlow

REST API

Mechanisms for Data Replication:

Pull Mechanism: In the pull mechanism, the receiver regularly polls for modified data. This approach is advantageous in the following scenarios:

  • To regulate the flow of data, enabling the receiver to manage incoming data based on resource availability.
  • When dealing with large data volumes, replication activities can be scheduled outside of standard business hours to alleviate strain on the receiver.

However, the pull mechanism may not be ideal in the following cases:

  • When instantaneous data dissemination to the receiver is necessary. Increasing polling frequency to achieve near real-time replication could lead to network overhead and additional strain on the sender system.
  • If duplicate data replications could result in adverse side effects.

Push Mechanism: In the push mechanism, the sender delivers data either instantaneously or at scheduled intervals. This approach is advantageous in the following scenarios:

  • When the receiver requires immediate access to changes.
  • If the receiver possesses the necessary resources to handle substantial data volumes from the sender, regardless of the sender's ability to regulate data flow.
  • In cases where duplicate data replications are unacceptable, assuming the sender does not transmit duplicates since the changes originated within the same system.

However, the push mechanism may not be suitable if the sender lacks control over the data flow rate, or if the middleware layer or receiver lacks sufficient resources to process incoming data volumes.

 

 

This blog delves into the integration of a non-SAP system with Sales and Service Cloud V2 using REST APIs, with SAP BTP Integration Suite serving as the middleware layer.

  • The scenario outlined below focuses on replicating opportunities from Sales Cloud V2 to the non-SAP system using a pull mechanism.
  • Pagination is employed to retrieve 1000 opportunities at a time.

What's not accounted for:

  • Initial and delta replication: If the receiver requires access to all existing opportunities as well as those created or modified since the last replication occurred at regular intervals, this criterion must be incorporated as a filter condition when reading opportunities. The last replication datetime could be utilized to identify opportunities modified after this specific datetime..
  • Error handling: In the event of partial replication of opportunities during any iteration, failed opportunities are not re-pulled unless they undergo modifications in the source system. Resolving this can be achieved by setting the last replication datetime to the datetime of the last successful replication. It's crucial to ensure proper management of duplicate replications, particularly if the receiver does not accept duplicates.

IFlow Steps:

1. Authentication with Sales Cloud V2: Authentication is conducted via the OAuth URL (https://<HOSTNAME>/auth/token) using provided credentials. OAuth authentication requires the content type to be "application/x-www-form-urlencoded". However, if the content/request body is empty, the Iflow OAuth adapter does not utilize the selected content type. To address this, a content modifier is used to set the content type, and the HTTP adapter is utilized for the authentication request.

 

 

2. Determining the quantity of modified opportunities: To implement pagination and ascertain the number of pages to be read, retrieve the count of new and modified opportunities using the query parameter $count=true.

 

3. Retrieving modified opportunities: Retrieve modified opportunities one page at a time using a looping process control. The process concludes either when the index reaches the count read earlier or when the loop pass reaches the maximum number of iterations set on the looping process control. Utilize query parameters $top to define the page size and $skip to bypass pages already read in previous loop passes. Ensure opportunities are sorted by unique ID to ensure proper pagination.

API Endpoint for Reading Opportunities: https://api.sap.com/api/SalesSvcCloudV2_opportunity/path/queryopportunityservice_opportunity

 

 

4. Publishing to the target:

Map the opportunities to the target structure and publish them to the target system.

 

Sample script used for extracting opportunity count, calculating index, and logging

 

 

 

	import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
	import java.util.HashMap;
	import groovy.json.JsonSlurper;
	
	def Message initializeLog(Message message) {
	    if (message.getProperty("enableLog") == "true")
	    {
	        def logMsg = new StringBuilder();
	        logMsg.append("************* B E G I N   M A S S   L O A D *************").append(System.lineSeparator());
	    
	        message.setProperty("logMsg", logMsg.toString());
	    }
	    return message;
	}
	
	def Message extractCount(Message message) {
	    def jsonSlurper = new JsonSlurper();
	    def body = jsonSlurper.parseText(message.getBody(String));
	    final String COUNT = 'count';
	
	    if (body.get(COUNT) != null)
	    {
	        message.setProperty("count", body.get(COUNT));
	        message.setProperty("page", 0);
	        message.setProperty("index", 0);
	        
	        if (message.getProperty("enableLog") == "true")
	        {
	            def logMsg = new StringBuilder();
	            def log = message.getProperty("logMsg");
	            if (log != null)
	            {
	                logMsg.append(log);
	            }
	    
	            logMsg.append("*************** B E F O R E   R E A D   P A G E ***************").append(System.lineSeparator());
	            logMsg.append("Count :: ").append(message.getProperty("count")).append(System.lineSeparator());
	            logMsg.append("Page Size :: ").append(message.getProperty("pageSize")).append(System.lineSeparator());
	    
	            message.setProperty("logMsg", logMsg.toString());
	        }
	    }
	    return message;
	}
	
	def Message extractToken(Message message) {
	    def jsonSlurper = new JsonSlurper();
	    def body = jsonSlurper.parseText(message.getBody(String));
	    final String VALUE = 'value';
	    final String TOKEN = 'access_token';
	
	    if (body.get(VALUE) != null && body.get(VALUE).get(TOKEN) != null)
	    {
	        message.setHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + body.get(VALUE).get(TOKEN));
	    }
	    
	    if (message.getProperty("enableLog") == "true")
	    {
	        def logMsg = new StringBuilder();
	        def log = message.getProperty("logMsg");
	        if (log != null)
	        {
	            logMsg.append(log);
	        }
	        
	        logMsg.append(System.lineSeparator()).append("*************** A U T H   T O K E N   A D D E D **********").append(System.lineSeparator());
	        message.setProperty("logMsg", logMsg.toString());    
	    }
	    return message;
	}
	
	def Message calculateIndex(Message message) {
	    def properties = message.getProperties();
	    def page = properties.get("page");
	    def index = properties.get("index");
	    def pageSize = properties.get("pageSize") as Integer;
	
	    if (page != null && index != null && pageSize != null)
	    {
	        message.setProperty("index", page * pageSize);
	        message.setProperty("page", page + 1);
	
	        if (message.getProperty("enableLog") == "true")
	        {
	            def logMsg = new StringBuilder();
	            def log = message.getProperty("logMsg");
	            if (log != null)
	            {
	                logMsg.append(log);
	            }
	    
	            logMsg.append("*************** I T E R A T I O N :: ").append(properties.get("page") + 1).append(" ***************").append(System.lineSeparator());
	            logMsg.append("Page :: ").append(properties.get("page")).append(System.lineSeparator());
	            logMsg.append("Current Index :: ").append(properties.get("index") + 1).append(System.lineSeparator());
	    
	            message.setProperty("logMsg",logMsg.toString());
	        }
	    }
	
	    return message;
	}
	
	def Message saveLogMsg(Message message) {
	
	    if (message.getProperty("enableLog") == "true")
	    {
	        def log =  message.getProperty("logMsg");
	    
	        def logMsg = new StringBuilder();
	        logMsg.append("************* B E G I N   M A S S   L O A D *************").append(System.lineSeparator());
	    
	        if (log != null)
	        {
	            logMsg.append(log);
	        }
	        
	        logMsg.append("************* E N D   M A S S   L O A D *************").append(System.lineSeparator());
	    	def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
	    	if (messageLog != null) {
	            messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Message Log ", log.toString(), "text/plain");
	    	}
	    }
	    return message;
	}

 

 

 

Disclaimer: The objective of this blog post is to illustrate the process of authenticating with SAP Sales Cloud V2 and extracting data at regular intervals. It does not serve as a recommendation for implementing data extraction from SAP Sales Cloud V2. As stated earlier, the example provided above does not address scenarios involving initial data loads, error handling, and other considerations. Additionally, the sample code provided here is intended solely for demonstration purposes and is not suitable for production use.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Near your place, I liked the Amish Museum.
During my travels, I wish to go back to Wisdom Forest in my homeland.

entry.title: Re: Permanently Purge Partial External Users in SuccessFactors (ONB 2.0)
entry.content:
@josmerjoseph6 

As Michael stated above, since the 2H 2023 release the Purge Inactive User purge type is no longer available. We have attempted to use the DRTM Master Data Purge purge type and the result is unsuccessful. Is there a different option to select to purge the inactive_external user/ incomplete record from EC?

entry.title: Re: mb03 is obsolet? Is there a replacement?
entry.content: MIGO->Display->Material Document #

entry.title: Export and Import Feature of SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
In this blog will discuss about the Export and Import Feature of Talent Intelligence Hub (TIH), which was released during second half of 2023. For more comprehensive understanding of Talent Intelligence Hub and its usage across SAP SuccessFactors suite you may please refer the IDP - “Talent Intelligence Hub: Implementation Considerations”

We will cover the following items in this blog:

  • Current data structure in TIH
  • Use Cases where Export/Import feature of TIH can be used.
  • Export and Import Feature details in TIH
    • Using SAP API (Business Accelerator) Hub to get the .icd files for Export/Import
    • Integration Center Job setup to Export/Import data from/in TIH
    • Sample Import and Export templates/files
  • How to get Skillsplex Library data in TIH

So, let’s start with understanding first what are the different data elements in Talent Intelligence Hub and what are the different use cases where this Export and Import feature will be useful.

Current data structure in Talent Intelligence Hub (TIH)

There are two main components of TIH where data can be exported/imported:

  1. The TIH (Attributes) Library
  2. The Growth Portfolio

Further TIH (Attributes) Library has following set of data points and I have marked the ones which are today available with Export/Import Feature:

S.No.

TIH (Attributes) Library Entities

Can be used with Export/Import feature?

1

Proficiency Scale

No (should be created manually in TIH)

2

Attribute Type

No (should be created manually in TIH)

3

Attributes

Yes

4

Attribute’s Translation (Text)

Yes

5

Tags

Yes

6

Tag’s Translation (Text)

Yes

7

Behaviors

Yes

8

Behavior’s Translation (Text)

Yes

9

Attribute-Tag mapping

Yes

10

Attribute-Behavior mapping

Yes

Use Cases

There are different scenarios where TIH Export/Import feature is useful:

  • Import Feature
    • Upload the above data in bulk in TIH either to update or create new. E.g.: Upload 100 new Skills in Attribute library, make attributes inactive in bulk, associate skills to multiple employee’s Growth portfolio etc.
    • Integration with 3rd Party systems. E.g.: Get attribute data from another 3rd party system to SF TIH, could be the Skill Library data, could be Skill Profile data of employee to be migrated into Growth Portfolio which was maintained in different system earlier
  • Export Feature
    • Extract the data from TIH to know External Id or wsmid of an attribute for different mappings within SuccessFactors modules. E.g.: For attribute to tag mapping, one needs to know the external Id of both the attribute and tag in TIH OR while mapping the Skill/Competency attribute to Job Roles in Job Profile Builder, wsmid is required for mapping.
    • Extract the data from TIH to send it to other 3rd party systems. E.g.:  Sending Growth Portfolio data to other 3rd party systems for their consumption of Employee’s Skill profile data OR sending Attribute Library data to other 3rd party systems to maintain one common Skill/Competency Library in a customer’s organization across multiple systems.

Export and Import Feature Details

Talent Intelligence Hub leverages Integration Center for importing and exporting entities.

Prerequisites

Before starting with Export/Import process one needs to download the .icd (Integration Centre Definition) files from SAP API (Business Accelerator) Hub using below links:

Export/Import

SAP API (Business Accelerator) Hub links

Templates available for Export/Import

TIH Library Export

Overview | SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub Library Export Templates | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

·       Attributes

·       Attribute’s Translation (Text)

·       Tags

·       Tag’s Translation (Text)

·       Behaviors

·       Behavior’s Translation (Text)

·       Attribute-Tag mapping

·       Attribute-Behavior mapping*

TIH Library Import

Overview | SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub Library Import Templates | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

TIH Growth Portfolio Export

Overview | SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub Growth Portfolio Export Template | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

·       Growth Portfolio

TIH Growth Portfolio Import

Overview | SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub Growth Portfolio Import Template | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

*Attribute-Behavior mapping - currently this only supports Behavior mapping with Competency Attribute type

What we get from SAP API (Business Accelerator) Hub links?

Each of the above link will take us to API Hub Page, where we see 3 different tabs:

  • Overview: this tab provides detail about each entity and what fields are part of each template and how to use these templates.

Eg: SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub Library Import Templates

 

  • Integration Center Definition:   “.icd” files can be downloaded from this tab.

     

    • Documents: Sample import files representing the file formats are provided in this tab for reference.

     

    Integration Center Job Setup for TIH

    Importing Entities

    The integration definition files contain all the details required for the inbound integration process.

    Steps to setup Import Job:

    • Go to Admin Center and choose Integration Center Settings.
    • From the Integration Center Landing Page, select My Integrations.

     

    • From the Integration Center - My Integrations page, choose + Create > Import an Integration Definition.

     

    • Choose Browse and upload the integration definition file(In this case any of TIH import .icd files). You may get a warning message post that, please select OK in that step and proceed.

     

    • From the Options page, enter an integration name and choose Next.

     

    • On the Configure Fields page, review the sample data and choose Next. You may also choose to upload your own file to verify if it’s aligned to respective .icd file template.

     

    • On the Source Settings page, specify the SFTP server details and choose Next. Also remember to upload your import file at designated sftp folder.

     

    • On the Scheduling page, select the frequency as required or just select Suspended/Not Scheduled to run the job without scheduling it in recurrence and then choose Next.

     

    • Now from Review and Run page, check the details of the job, then choose Run Now to run the inbound integration.

     

    • You can check status of your job by going to Admin Center > Scheduled Job Manager
    • Once the job is completed go to Admin Center > Manage Talent Intelligence Hub and check the data uploaded in Attributes Library, Tags etc.

    Exporting Entities

    The integration definition files contain all the details required for the exporting the data from TIH.

    Steps to setup Export Job:

    • Go to Admin Center and choose Integration Center Settings.
    • From the Integration Center Landing Page, select My Integrations.
    • From the Integration Center - My Integrations page, choose + Create > Import an Integration Definition.
    • Choose Browse and upload the integration definition file (In this case any of TIH export .icd files). You may get a warning message post that, please select OK in that step and proceed.
    • From the Options page, enter an integration name and choose Next.
    • On the Configure Fields page, review the sample data and choose Next.

     

    • On the Destination Settings page, specify the SFTP server details and choose Next.

     


    • On the Scheduling page, select the frequency as required or just select Suspended/Not Scheduled to run the job without scheduling it in recurrence and then choose Next.
    • Now from Review and Run page, check the details of the job, then choose Run Now to run the Export job.
    • You can check status of your job by going to Admin Center > Scheduled Job Manager
    • Once the Job is completed, check and download the exported file from your sFTP folder.

Sample Import Templates

 Tags

Tag Text (Translations)

Attribute Import

Attribute Tag Mapping

Sample Export Files

 Attribute Export File

Note: from 2403 release, Attribute Export file has got an extra ‘id’ column which is the ‘wsmid’ of an Attribute. This wsmid is used while mapping an Attribute (Skill/Competency) to Job Role via import.

Growth Portfolio Export File

Note: Few key pointers for Growth Portfolio Import/Export

  • The Growth Portfolio import-export includes the current proficiency of the employee.
  • The mandatory date format for imports is YYYY-MM-DD
  • Person external Id- External ID of the person. This helps to have only one Growth Portfolio for multiple user assignments in the system.
  • Proficiency Level - Proficiency level of the person for a particular attribute.
  • Status- Allowed values are I and A.  I for Inactive, A for Active. When marked I, then the attribute will not be visible on the portfolio.
  • Preference Value - Allowed values are 0 or 1. 1 implies that the person is passionate or highly interested about the attribute.
  • Proficiency Assigned Date - This is the last modified date for the attribute on the growth portfolio.

How to get SkillsPlex Library data in TIH

SkillsPlex library of skills was available earlier to be downloaded when Skills were part of Job Profile Builder (JPB)

Now, this entire library is available to be imported into TIH. The Import files can be downloaded from https://api.sap.com/package/TalentIntelligenceHubSkillsPlexAttributeImport/overview and then use the Import feature(as explained above) to load this data into TIH.

The documents provided in this package can be used to import SkillsPlex data into Talent Intelligence Hub of SAP SuccessFactors. This package provides data file for SkillsPlex Attributes, Tags, and Attribute to Tag Mapping.

Note: This is useful for customers, who had SkillsPlex earlier enabled at Job Profile Builder and now want to leverage that library in TIH as well.

Thanks for reading this blog and let me know any feedback/suggestions in comments.

SAP SuccessFactors platform Talent Management

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report for Visual Studio 2022 on Windows 11 ARM
entry.content:
OK, as noted YOU MUST install using Run as Admin...

The reason the rpt files open as binary is because craxddrt.dll has not been registered.

Re-install using Admin account.

Interesting code at the end of the install log:

1701[2] is not a valid entry for a product ID.

Looking in my log file I don't see that error it's not even close to what mine looks like.

Did you install this file?

CR for Visual Studio SP35 64b installer (VS 2022 and above)

I did not hear back from R&D so still waiting to hear if SAP supports ARM on Macbook...

entry.title: What are the processing classes for a wage type that should only be SS & Medicare Taxable?
entry.content: I need to set up a wage type that only needs to be added to Social Security and Medicare wages. What processing classes do I use on v_512w_d?
